overall.description: A slow panoramic view of a rustic cabin interior at night, rendered in a game engine. The camera pans horizontally from a stone fireplace across a wooden staircase to reveal a cozy dining area, illuminated by firelight and hanging lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin living area with stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: standing still and slowly panning view rightward across the cabin interior, focusing on the stone fireplace and wooden staircase

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and wooden mantle
steep wooden stairs with simple railings leading to upper floor
long rifle or musket mounted on wall between fireplace and stairs
framed painting hanging on wall near staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cozy cabin interior dominated by a stone fireplace with active fire on the left. The camera slowly pans right, revealing a wooden staircase ascending to an upper level. The warm firelight illuminates the wooden walls and floor, with a rifle mounted on the wall between the fireplace and stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining area with wooden furniture and hanging lantern

events.description: hanging oil lantern comes into view, adding secondary warm illumination to the fireplace glow

agents.ego_description: continuing the slow rightward pan to reveal the dining area and upstairs window

entered.detail: wooden dining table with chairs arranged around it
blue and green checkered rug under the dining table
lit oil lantern suspended from ceiling beam
window at top of stairs showing dark night sky outside

segments.scene_description: As the pan continues, the dining area comes into view with a wooden table and chairs atop a plaid rug. A hanging oil lantern provides additional warm lighting, and a window at the top of the stairs reveals the night outside. The fireplace remains visible on the left edge while the rifle mount passes out of view behind the camera's left periphery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow horizontal pan through a rustic cabin interior that shifts from the warmth of a hearth to a cozy dining area. It begins focused on a stone fireplace with an active fire, moving right to reveal a rifle mounted on the wooden wall and a staircase ascending to an upper level. As the camera continues its sweep, the firelight blends with the glow of a hanging oil lantern to illuminate a wooden dining table and chairs set upon a plaid rug. The scene then expands to reveal a window at the top of the stairs showing the dark night outside, while the fireplace gradually recedes toward the left edge of the frame.
